explanation: This command uses the exact flags matched by the Sigma rule. It is a direct representation of the suspicious PowerShell launch parameters associated with Empire.
This command uses equivalent flag substitutions (-w 1 instead of Hidden) and matches one of the patterns in the Sigma rule.
This command omits the -sta flag, which is optional in many PowerShell invocations, but still matches the suspicious pattern of flags used in Empire.
This command omits all optional flags except the -enc flag, which is central to the Sigma rule's detection logic.
This command matches the pattern of Empire-related PowerShell execution using alternative flag syntax.
